framework_metadata.description: Blackwell 2-GPU TP legacy-compatible FLUX compile profile.
framework_metadata.notes: Use for SGLang commits before --performance-mode speed existed; TP remains explicit.

results.server_command: sglang serve --model-path black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev --port 30420 --host 127.0.0.1 --backend sglang --num-gpus 2 --model-type diffusion --warmup --dit-layerwise-offload false --tp-size 2 --enable-torch-compile --warmup-steps 3

framework_metadata.description: Blackwell 2-GPU TP fastest vLLM-Omni FLUX profile probe.
framework_metadata.notes: The harness adds --tensor-parallel-size 2 when num_gpus=2; use with compile allowed.

metrics.latency_anomaly_reason: single-request latency 59.2s is 3.5x the steady-state throughput p50 (16.7s) -- isolated-request stall, not compute

framework_metadata.description: Best known TensorRT-LLM VisualGen command for aligned non-cache FLUX.1 runs.
framework_metadata.notes: Keep this profile updated as the best command changes. trtllm-serve auto-detects the FLUX.1 diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

framework_metadata.description: Blackwell 2-GPU TP legacy-compatible FLUX.2 compile profile.
framework_metadata.notes: Use for SGLang commits before --performance-mode speed existed; TP remains explicit.

results.server_command: sglang serve --model-path black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev --port 30420 --host 127.0.0.1 --backend sglang --num-gpus 2 --model-type diffusion --warmup --dit-layerwise-offload false --tp-size 2 --enable-torch-compile --warmup-steps 3

framework_metadata.description: Blackwell 2-GPU TP fastest vLLM-Omni FLUX.2 profile probe.
framework_metadata.notes: The harness adds --tensor-parallel-size 2 when num_gpus=2; use with compile allowed.

framework_metadata.description: Blackwell LightX2V FLUX.2 profile probe using source-built FlashAttention 2 plus FlashInfer RoPE.
framework_metadata.notes: Uses a source-built FlashAttention 2 wheel with TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST=10.0; the upstream FA3 wheel used for H200 is Hopper-only.

framework_metadata.description: Best known TensorRT-LLM VisualGen command for aligned non-cache FLUX.2 runs.

PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

framework_metadata.description: Best known SGLang command for the benchmark repo default profile.
framework_metadata.notes: Keep this profile updated when the best command changes for a SGLang release or commit.

framework_metadata.description: Blackwell vLLM-Omni profile using FlashInfer attention (validated on B200; the FLASH_ATTN backend hits Hopper-only precompiled kernels and fails with 'no kernel image' on sm_100).
framework_metadata.notes: Same case/model/steps as default; only the attention backend changes for Blackwell compatibility.

framework_metadata.description: Best known TensorRT-LLM VisualGen command for aligned non-cache Qwen-Image runs.
framework_metadata.notes: Keep this profile updated as the best command changes. trtllm-serve auto-detects the Qwen-Image diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

framework_metadata.description: Best known SGLang command for the benchmark repo default profile.
framework_metadata.notes: Keep this profile updated when the best command changes for a SGLang release or commit.

framework_metadata.description: Blackwell vLLM-Omni profile using FlashInfer attention (validated on B200; the FLASH_ATTN backend hits Hopper-only precompiled kernels and fails with 'no kernel image' on sm_100).
framework_metadata.notes: Same case/model/steps as default; only the attention backend changes for Blackwell compatibility.

framework_metadata.description: Blackwell LightX2V profile using FlashAttention 2 (validated on B200 via the flux2 blackwell-fa2-flashinfer profile). Same precision class (full-precision, exact attention) as SGLang's FA4 and vLLM-Omni's FlashInfer backend on Blackwell -- flash_attn3/flash_attn4 hit Hopper-only precompiled kernels or a CUDA-toolkit>=13.1 CuTe-DSL requirement not met by this build, so FA2 is the fastest same-class (full-precision) option available here.
framework_metadata.notes: Uses the source-built FlashAttention 2 wheel (TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST=10.0) already installed for Blackwell; no cache, torch compile, or quantized model path. Deliberately NOT using SageAttention here -- it is int8 QK-quantized, a different numeric class from the full-precision attention used elsewhere in this comparison.

framework_metadata.description: Fallback SGLang command when no hardware-specific profile matches.
framework_metadata.notes: Use hardware-specific profiles for formal H100/H200 runs.

results.server_command: sglang serve --model-path Lightricks/LTX-2.3 --port 30420 --host 127.0.0.1 --backend sglang --num-gpus 2 --model-type diffusion --warmup --enable-cfg-parallel --pipeline-class-name LTX2TwoStagePipeline --warmup-steps 3

framework_metadata.description: LightX2V upstream LTX-2.3 t2av path for the LTX-2.3 121-frame case.
framework_metadata.notes: Uses upstream LTX-2.3 audio-video runner. CFG parallel is not enabled because upstream mm_guider and cfg_parallel are not compatible.

framework_metadata.description: Cosmos3 Nano T2V profile for SGLang-Diffusion main 3d540563.
framework_metadata.notes: 4-GPU CFG parallel plus Ulysses SP for long-video H200 serving; guardrails disabled, no cache.

results.server_command: sglang serve --model-path nvidia/Cosmos3-Nano --port 30420 --host 127.0.0.1 --backend sglang --num-gpus 4 --model-type diffusion --warmup --attention-backend fa --cfg-parallel-size 2 --ulysses-degree 2 --warmup-steps 3

framework_metadata.description: Blackwell Cosmos3 Nano T2V profile using FlashInfer attention (validated on B200; FLASH_ATTN hits Hopper-only precompiled kernels on sm_100).
framework_metadata.notes: Same as default except --diffusion-attention-backend FLASHINFER_ATTN for Blackwell compatibility.

results.server_command: vllm serve nvidia/Cosmos3-Nano --port 30420 --host 127.0.0.1 --omni --num-gpus 4 --cfg-parallel-size 2 --ulysses-degree 2 --model-class-name Cosmos3OmniDiffusersPipeline --stage-init-timeout 900 --init-timeout 1800 --no-guardrails --diffusion-attention-backend FLASHINFER_ATTN --cache-backend none --enforce-eager --compilation-config '{"mode":0}'
